mapper.select: SELECT * FROM menu WHERE menu_id = #{menuId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM menu WHERE parent_menu_id = #{parentMenuId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort, menu_id
SELECT * FROM menu WHERE (role_id = #{roleId} OR role_id = '0') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort, menu_id
SELECT * FROM menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort, menu_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu (href, icon, target, title, role_id, parent_menu_id, sort) VALUES (#{href}, #{icon}, #{target}, #{title}, #{roleId}, #{parentMenuId}, #{sort})
mapper.update:
UPDATE menu
href = #{href}, icon = #{icon}, target = #{target}, title = #{title}, role_id = #{roleId}, parent_menu_id = #{parentMenuId}, sort = #{sort},
WHERE menu_id = #{menuId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE menu SET deleted = 1 WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
